pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicit SQL query
Task description explicit requirement to DISABLE 'Allow Spell Check'
Task description explicit requirement to DISABLE 'Allow Grammar Check'
Task description explicit requirement to ENABLE 'Allow Dictionary Search'
Task description explicit requirement for French ('fr' or 'fr-FR')

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the required task parameters are synthetically generated and explicitly instructed in the task description. The configuration name must be 'French 305 Midterm', with spell check and grammar check disabled (false), dictionary search enabled (true), and language prefix set to 'fr'. These values are matched exactly by the export script pulling from the MariaDB database.
